pageContext.name: Shaun of the Dead
pageContext.description: 'And the front door is open AGAIN!'  Sideshow and Vice Press present the Shaun of the Dead Fine Art Lithograph by Juan Ramos!  This 36 x 18 unframed lithograph print is hand-numbered on 300gsm archival paper. Printed in the UK by White Duck Editions.  A must-have for fans of Shaun of the Dead!
